name: Cock 'n Bull Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Carrots, peeled and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine steak sauce, bouillon cubes, salt, pepper, sugar, and hot water in a crock pot; stir well.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except flour; mix carefully.
3. Cover and cook on LOW setting for 7 to 10 hours or on HIGH setting for 4 hours.
4. Before serving, remove chicken and bones, and return the meat to the crock pot; stir well.
5. To thicken the gravy, make a smooth paste of flour and 1/4 cup of juices from the stew.
6. Add the flour mixture to the crock pot; cover and cook on HIGH setting until thickened.
